_doc: v0.5 _crosswalkUnsupported uses SPARQL FILTER NOT EXISTS on the cross-entity (?soa, ?control) match. Multi-valued — emits one derived triple per orphaned framework. Consumer rule iterates per orphaned framework.
v0_5_behavior_triggering: fires (NIST AI RMF declared in SoA but no Control carries it)
v0_5_behavior_valid: does not fire (Control carries the framework)
